tasks.label: deploy:steam-eso-addons
args:
set -euo pipefail
DEST_ROOT="/home/mrbasa/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/306130/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Documents/Elder Scrolls Online/live/AddOns"
REPO="/home/mrbasa/Dev/ESO-Addons"
SKIP_NAMES='.shared .cursor .vscode docs scripts'
skip_member() {
  local d="$1"
  case " $d " in
    *"/../"*|*"/./"*) return 0 ;;
  esac
  case " $SKIP_NAMES " in
    *" $d "*) return 0 ;;
  esac
  [[ "$d" == .* ]] && return 0
  return 1
}
cd "$REPO"
for dir in */; do
  name="${dir%/}"
  skip_member "$name" && continue
  [[ -f "$name/manifest.txt" ]] || continue
  dest="$DEST_ROOT/$name"
  mkdir -p "$dest"
  cp -a "$name"/. "$dest/"
done
echo "Deployed add-ons with manifest.txt into $DEST_ROOT"
